title: viburnum punctatum var. lepidotulum
intro: Viburnum punctatum var. lepidotulum is a rare and lesser-known variety of the fragrant, shrub-like plant Viburnum punctatum, native to the southeastern United States. This plant, commonly known as a sweet-fragrant shrub, is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Viburnum punctatum var. lepidotulum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and spasms, and promote wound healing, making it useful in treating a range of conditions from feverish illnesses to skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Viburnum punctatum var. lepidotulum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
